recommendation: Apple should invest heavily in research and development to expand AI integration across all its products and services, including Siri, HomeKit, HealthKit, and iCloud.
expected_impact: 1. Enhanced user experience: By improving AI capabilities
Apple can offer more personalized and intuitive interactions with its users
leading to increased customer satisfaction and loyalty.
risk_assessment: 1. Privacy concerns: Increased AI integration may raise privacy concerns among users
particularly if Apple collects and uses personal data in new ways. The company will need to be transparent about its data collection and usage policies to mitigate these risks.
